'''''Akaga''''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate/Legends|EF76 Nebulon-B escort frigate]] under command of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==History==
After the [[Battle of Hoth/Legends|Battle of Hoth]] when [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Harkov]] moved against the Empire, ''Akaga'' defected from the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]] to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]]. When Lord [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Vader]] later [[Battle of Ottega|tracked]] Harkov's forces down in the [[Ottega system/Legends|Ottega system]], he sent the [[Interdictor/Legends|Interdictor]] ''[[Harpax]]'' to trap the traitorous Admiral's former flagship [[Protector (Victory I-class)|''Protector'']], prompting a frenzied retaliation by both the ''Akaga'' and the Rebel [[MC40a light cruiser/Legends|Calamari Cruiser]] [[Warhawk (MC40a light cruiser)|''Warhawk'']]. The Akaga attempted to pursue and destroy the ''Harpax'' but after it was intercepted by loyalist starfighters led by [[Tan (title)|Tan]] [[Maarek Stele/Legends|Maarek Stele]], it was eventually destroyed.

*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]''
